-- LuaShield Debug Wrapper
local function _ls_showErr(e)
    pcall(function()
        local p
        pcall(function()
            local ok, cg = pcall(game.GetService, game, "CoreGui")
            p = ok and cg or nil
        end)
        if not p then
            local lp = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
            p = lp:WaitForChild("PlayerGui", 5)
        end
        if not p then return end
        local sg = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
        sg.Name = "LSDebugErr"
        sg.ResetOnSpawn = false
        sg.DisplayOrder = 99999
        local bg = Instance.new("Frame", sg)
        bg.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 180)
        bg.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
        bg.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(20, 0, 0)
        bg.BorderSizePixel = 0
        local lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel", bg)
        lbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, -16, 1, -12)
        lbl.Position = UDim2.new(0, 8, 0, 6)
        lbl.TextWrapped = true
        lbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
        lbl.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Top
        lbl.Text = "LuaShield VM Error:\n" .. tostring(e)
        lbl.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 130, 130)
        lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        lbl.TextSize = 13
        lbl.Font = Enum.Font.Code
        sg.Parent = p
    end)
end

local _ok, _err = xpcall(function()


local R0 = (function()
  local vkHRp = {}
  
  
  
  local YP = _ENV or (getfenv and getfenv()) or _G or {}
  
  vkHRp.print = print vkHRp.type = type vkHRp.pairs = pairs vkHRp.ipairs = ipairs
  vkHRp.next = next vkHRp.select = select vkHRp.pcall = pcall vkHRp.xpcall = xpcall
  vkHRp.error = error vkHRp.tostring = tostring vkHRp.tonumber = tonumber
  vkHRp.rawget = rawget vkHRp.rawset = rawset vkHRp.rawequal = rawequal vkHRp.rawlen = rawlen
  vkHRp.setmetatable = setmetatable vkHRp.getmetatable = getmetatable
  vkHRp.require = require vkHRp.assert = assert
  vkHRp.table = table vkHRp.string = string vkHRp.math = math
  vkHRp.coroutine = coroutine vkHRp.io = io vkHRp.os = os
  
  
  local function j2(ztBQ2)
    local NHIg9, SrBEA = pcall(function() return YP[ztBQ2] end)
    if NHIg9 and SrBEA ~= nil then vkHRp[ztBQ2] = SrBEA end
  end
  j2("game") j2("workspace") j2("script")
  j2("task") j2("wait") j2("spawn") j2("delay") j2("tick")
  j2("warn") j2("typeof") j2("loadstring")
  j2("shared") j2("settings") j2("stats")
  j2("Vector2") j2("Vector3") j2("CFrame")
  j2("Color3") j2("BrickColor") j2("UDim") j2("UDim2")
  j2("Enum") j2("Instance") j2("Ray") j2("Region3")
  j2("NumberRange") j2("TweenInfo")
  j2("ColorSequence") j2("ColorSequenceKeypoint")
  j2("NumberSequence") j2("NumberSequenceKeypoint")
  j2("PhysicalProperties") j2("Random") j2("DateTime")
  j2("Faces") j2("Axes") j2("RaycastParams") j2("OverlapParams")
  j2("_G") j2("_VERSION")
  
  
  
  setmetatable(vkHRp, { ["__index"] = function(CMc, c9Xp)
    local sJ, oQ = pcall(function() return YP[c9Xp] end)
    if sJ and oQ ~= nil then return oQ end
    if _G then
      local cGXs, jjku_ = pcall(function() return _G[c9Xp] end)
      if cGXs then return jjku_ end
    end
    return nil
  end })
  return vkHRp
end)()
local function es(yla07, Ud3, ...)
  local SRq8 = {}
  local UL1wp = 1
  local _Uf = yla07[1]
  local jOIY2 = yla07[2]
  local ehG = yla07[3]
  local kas_q = Ud3 or {}
  local R5NB = -1
  local function h1rC8(VX61m) if VX61m >= 256 then return jOIY2[VX61m - 255] end return SRq8[VX61m] end
  local EaQ = select("#", ...)
  for N4 = 1, EaQ do SRq8[N4 - 1] = select(N4, ...) end
  while true do
    local AB7 = _Uf[UL1wp]
    local DY = AB7[1]
    local WA69C = AB7[2]
    local Q0i = AB7[3]
    local g2 = AB7[4]
    UL1wp = UL1wp + 1
    if DY == 26 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = {}
    elseif DY == 20 then
      if Q0i == 0 then
        local vsR = select("#", ...)
        for Yxa = 0, vsR - 1 do SRq8[WA69C + Yxa] = select(Yxa + 1, ...) end
        R5NB = WA69C + vsR - 1
      else
        for Yxa = 0, Q0i - 2 do SRq8[WA69C + Yxa] = select(Yxa + 1, ...) end
      end
    elseif DY == 9 then
      if (not not SRq8[WA69C]) ~= (g2 ~= 0) then UL1wp = UL1wp + 1 end
    elseif DY == 11 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = SRq8[Q0i][h1rC8(g2)]
    elseif DY == 10 then
      local VzBz = {}
      for Yxa = Q0i, g2 do VzBz[#VzBz + 1] = tostring(SRq8[Yxa]) end
      SRq8[WA69C] = table.concat(VzBz)
    elseif DY == 2 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = kas_q[Q0i + 1][1]
    elseif DY == 3 then
      local bS = SRq8[Q0i]
      SRq8[WA69C + 1] = bS
      SRq8[WA69C] = bS[h1rC8(g2)]
    elseif DY == 22 then
      kas_q[Q0i + 1][1] = SRq8[WA69C]
    elseif DY == 34 then
      if (h1rC8(Q0i) < h1rC8(g2)) ~= (WA69C ~= 0) then UL1wp = UL1wp + 1 end
    elseif DY == 23 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = h1rC8(Q0i) % h1rC8(g2)
    elseif DY == 17 then
      if (not not SRq8[Q0i]) ~= (g2 ~= 0) then
        UL1wp = UL1wp + 1
      else
        SRq8[WA69C] = SRq8[Q0i]
      end
    elseif DY == 36 then
      local a4nj = SRq8[WA69C]
      local CA = {}
      for Yxa = 1, Q0i - 1 do CA[Yxa] = SRq8[WA69C + Yxa] end
      return a4nj(table.unpack(CA))
    elseif DY == 29 then
      local G2XHo = ehG[Q0i + 1]
      local M28 = {}
      local Cvj = G2XHo[6]
      for Yxa = 1, #Cvj do
        local NfeKq = Cvj[Yxa]
        if NfeKq[1] == 1 then
          if NfeKq[3] == 1 then
            M28[Yxa] = SRq8[NfeKq[2]]
          else
            M28[Yxa] = {SRq8[NfeKq[2]]}
          end
        else
          M28[Yxa] = kas_q[NfeKq[2] + 1]
        end
      end
      SRq8[WA69C] = function(...)
        return es(G2XHo, M28, ...)
      end
    elseif DY == 31 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = jOIY2[Q0i + 1]
    elseif DY == 16 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = #SRq8[Q0i]
    elseif DY == 15 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = SRq8[WA69C] + SRq8[WA69C + 2]
      if (SRq8[WA69C + 2] > 0 and SRq8[WA69C] <= SRq8[WA69C + 1]) or
         (SRq8[WA69C + 2] < 0 and SRq8[WA69C] >= SRq8[WA69C + 1]) then
        SRq8[WA69C + 3] = SRq8[WA69C]
        UL1wp = UL1wp + Q0i
      end
    elseif DY == 28 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = SRq8[Q0i]
    elseif DY == 7 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = h1rC8(Q0i) * h1rC8(g2)
    elseif DY == 39 then
      R0[jOIY2[Q0i + 1]] = SRq8[WA69C]
    elseif DY == 12 then
      for Yxa = WA69C, Q0i do SRq8[Yxa] = nil end
    elseif DY == 0 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = -SRq8[Q0i]
    elseif DY == 19 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = {SRq8[WA69C]}
    elseif DY == 40 then
      local wRBq = SRq8[WA69C]
      local zYt = SRq8[WA69C + 1]
      local fH = SRq8[WA69C + 2]
      local oiG = table.pack(wRBq(zYt, fH))
      for Yxa = 0, g2 - 1 do SRq8[WA69C + 3 + Yxa] = oiG[Yxa + 1] end
      if SRq8[WA69C + 3] ~= nil then
        SRq8[WA69C + 2] = SRq8[WA69C + 3]
      else
        UL1wp = UL1wp + 1
      end
    elseif DY == 21 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = h1rC8(Q0i) ^ h1rC8(g2)
    elseif DY == 4 then
      if (h1rC8(Q0i) <= h1rC8(g2)) ~= (WA69C ~= 0) then UL1wp = UL1wp + 1 end
    elseif DY == 14 then
      SRq8[WA69C][1] = SRq8[Q0i]
    elseif DY == 32 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = h1rC8(Q0i) - h1rC8(g2)
    elseif DY == 13 then
      SRq8[WA69C][h1rC8(Q0i)] = h1rC8(g2)
    elseif DY == 1 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = Q0i ~= 0
      if g2 ~= 0 then UL1wp = UL1wp + 1 end
    elseif DY == 5 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = not SRq8[Q0i]
    elseif DY == 6 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = SRq8[Q0i][1]
    elseif DY == 27 then
      local a0 = SRq8[WA69C]
      local jVtC = (g2 - 1) * 50
      local Mgz = Q0i
      if Q0i == 0 then Mgz = R5NB - WA69C end
      for Yxa = 1, Mgz do a0[jVtC + Yxa] = SRq8[WA69C + Yxa] end
    elseif DY == 24 then
      if (h1rC8(Q0i) == h1rC8(g2)) ~= (WA69C ~= 0) then UL1wp = UL1wp + 1 end
    elseif DY == 25 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = h1rC8(Q0i) / h1rC8(g2)
    elseif DY == 37 then
      local a4nj = SRq8[WA69C]
      local Mgz
      if Q0i == 0 then Mgz = R5NB - WA69C else Mgz = Q0i - 1 end
      local CA = {}
      for Yxa = 1, Mgz do CA[Yxa] = SRq8[WA69C + Yxa] end
      local jO = table.pack(a4nj(table.unpack(CA, 1, Mgz)))
      if g2 == 0 then
        for Yxa = 0, jO.n - 1 do SRq8[WA69C + Yxa] = jO[Yxa + 1] end
        R5NB = WA69C + jO.n - 1
      else
        for Yxa = 0, g2 - 2 do SRq8[WA69C + Yxa] = jO[Yxa + 1] end
      end
    elseif DY == 18 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = h1rC8(Q0i) + h1rC8(g2)
    elseif DY == 30 then
      if Q0i == 1 then return end
      local Mgz
      if Q0i == 0 then Mgz = R5NB - WA69C + 1 else Mgz = Q0i - 1 end
      local jO = {}
      for Yxa = 0, Mgz - 1 do jO[Yxa + 1] = SRq8[WA69C + Yxa] end
      return table.unpack(jO, 1, Mgz)
    elseif DY == 38 then
      UL1wp = UL1wp + Q0i
    elseif DY == 8 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = SRq8[WA69C] - SRq8[WA69C + 2]
      UL1wp = UL1wp + Q0i
    elseif DY == 33 then
      SRq8[WA69C] = R0[jOIY2[Q0i + 1]]
    end
  end
end

local qPy_, dPyj, WxDi, jS46 = string.byte, string.char, table.concat, tonumber
local function Li4nA(rA_k, Oh)
  local XHX = (Oh * 167 + 196) % 256
  local DfLNR = {}
  for Yxa = 1, #rA_k do
    XHX = (XHX * 73 + 64 + 41) % 256
    DfLNR[Yxa] = dPyj((qPy_(rA_k, Yxa) - XHX) % 256)
  end
  return WxDi(DfLNR)
end

local xuk8, SwdMn, m4, faO, iylU, sfI =
  string.byte, string.sub, string.char, table.concat, math.floor, tonumber



local Svv = "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/"
local b0Llm = {}
for wn0 = 1, #Svv do b0Llm[xuk8(Svv, wn0)] = wn0 - 1 end
local function _OGmk(c6X)
  local DfLNR, RfT, iX, z5k = {}, 0, 1, #c6X
  while iX <= z5k do
    local z3GN = b0Llm[xuk8(c6X, iX)]; local qY1 = b0Llm[xuk8(c6X, iX + 1)]
    local AoZH = xuk8(c6X, iX + 2); local yqH = xuk8(c6X, iX + 3); iX = iX + 4
    local Mgz = z3GN * 262144 + qY1 * 4096
    if AoZH ~= 61 then Mgz = Mgz + b0Llm[AoZH] * 64 end
    if yqH ~= 61 then Mgz = Mgz + b0Llm[yqH] end
    RfT = RfT + 1; DfLNR[RfT] = m4(iylU(Mgz / 65536) % 256)
    if AoZH ~= 61 then RfT = RfT + 1; DfLNR[RfT] = m4(iylU(Mgz / 256) % 256) end
    if yqH ~= 61 then RfT = RfT + 1; DfLNR[RfT] = m4(Mgz % 256) end
  end
  return faO(DfLNR)
end
local function CLQLE(cLUxo, Oh)
  if Oh then cLUxo = Li4nA(cLUxo, Oh) end
  local Vgn3p = 1
  local function qc()
    local AE7gp, bpDu4 = 0, 1
    while true do
      local qY1 = xuk8(cLUxo, Vgn3p); Vgn3p = Vgn3p + 1
      AE7gp = AE7gp + (qY1 % 128) * bpDu4
      if qY1 < 128 then break end
      bpDu4 = bpDu4 * 128
    end
    return AE7gp
  end
  local function iIZ()
    local I1vY = qc()
    local Mgz = iylU(I1vY / 2)
    if I1vY % 2 == 1 then Mgz = -Mgz - 1 end
    return Mgz
  end
  local function pjs()
    local z5k = qc()
    local iy = SwdMn(cLUxo, Vgn3p, Vgn3p + z5k - 1)
    Vgn3p = Vgn3p + z5k
    return iy
  end
  local function sd()
    local mS3S = xuk8(cLUxo, Vgn3p); Vgn3p = Vgn3p + 1
    if mS3S == 3 then return pjs()
    elseif mS3S == 2 then return sfI(pjs())
    elseif mS3S == 1 then local qY1 = xuk8(cLUxo, Vgn3p); Vgn3p = Vgn3p + 1; return qY1 ~= 0
    else return nil end
  end
  local function NnVg()
    local GhMv = qc()
    local hz = xuk8(cLUxo, Vgn3p); Vgn3p = Vgn3p + 1
    local xiHi = qc()
    local _Uf = {}
    for iX = 1, xiHi do
      local DY = qc(); local z3GN = iIZ(); local qY1 = iIZ(); local rA_k = iIZ()
      _Uf[iX] = { DY, z3GN, qY1, rA_k }
    end
    local XeNc = qc()
    local c9Xp = {}
    for iX = 1, XeNc do c9Xp[iX] = sd() end
    local M2 = qc()
    local lRU_q = {}
    for iX = 1, M2 do
      local qrHj = xuk8(cLUxo, Vgn3p); Vgn3p = Vgn3p + 1
      local Ec0iw = qc()
      local Cn = xuk8(cLUxo, Vgn3p); Vgn3p = Vgn3p + 1
      lRU_q[iX] = { qrHj, Ec0iw, Cn }
    end
    local KG = qc()
    local ehG = {}
    for iX = 1, KG do ehG[iX] = NnVg() end
    return { _Uf, c9Xp, ehG, GhMv, hz, lRU_q }
  end
  return NnVg()
end

es(CLQLE(_OGmk(""),32))

end, function(e)
    local t = tostring(e)
    pcall(function()
        t = t .. "\n" .. debug.traceback("", 2)
    end)
    return t
end)

if not _ok then
    _ls_showErr(_err)
    warn("[LuaShield] Error:", _err)
end
